displayName: VAT Return Prepared (the agent's computed 9-box figures)
description: Notarize-only record of a prepared VAT return: the nine HMRC boxes as computed from the accounting ledger, before any human declaration or filing. Field names mirror the HMRC submit body verbatim (vatDueSales..totalAcquisitionsExVAT) so the on-chain figures ARE the numbers that will be filed. sourceLedgerHash binds the figures to the exact accounting extract they were derived from (the MTD 'digital journey' link) — it is self-attested (AGLedger notarizes the claim, it does not recompute the tax or check the figures against reality). This is the performer/agent's work product; a distinct officer declares it true-and-complete in vat-return-declaration-v1 before it is irreversibly filed.

periodKey.description: HMRC period key this return is for (matches the retrieved obligation).

obligationRef.description: Optional recordId of the vat-obligation-retrieved-v1 this return answers (chain lineage).

vatDueSales.description: Box 1: VAT due on sales and other outputs. May be negative in a period where credit notes exceed sales (HMRC permits negative Boxes 1-4).

vatDueAcquisitions.description: Box 2: VAT due on acquisitions of goods made in Northern Ireland from EU member states.

totalVatDue.description: Box 3: total VAT due = Box 1 + Box 2. HMRC rejects VAT_TOTAL_VALUE if this is inconsistent; the validation gate checks it pre-flight.

vatReclaimedCurrPeriod.description: Box 4: VAT reclaimed on purchases and other inputs.

netVatDue.description: Box 5: net VAT to pay or reclaim = |Box 3 - Box 4|, always >= 0 (the only box HMRC floors non-negative). HMRC rejects VAT_NET_VALUE if inconsistent.

totalValueSalesExVAT.description: Box 6: total value of sales excluding VAT (whole pounds).

totalValuePurchasesExVAT.description: Box 7: total value of purchases excluding VAT (whole pounds).

totalValueGoodsSuppliedExVAT.description: Box 8: total value of goods dispatched from Northern Ireland to EU member states, ex VAT (whole pounds).

totalAcquisitionsExVAT.description: Box 9: total value of goods acquired in Northern Ireland from EU member states, ex VAT (whole pounds).

sourceLedgerHash.description: sha256:<hex> of the accounting extract these figures were computed from (the MTD digital-journey link). Self-attested provenance; not recomputed by AGLedger.

preparedBy.description: Identifier of the software/agent that prepared the figures.
